description_long: This is a modern bullpup-style rifle with a matte olive green polymer body and a distinctive integrated carry handle and rail system along the top. The rifle features a detachable translucent box magazine, allowing for quick visual checks of ammunition. The stock is integrated into the main body, typical of bullpup designs, which shortens the overall length while maintaining a full-length barrel. The barrel is relatively short and ends with a simple, unadorned muzzle. The grip and trigger are positioned forward of the magazine, and the rifle has a compact, angular profile with minimal external attachments. The overall design suggests a lightweight, tactical firearm suitable for urban environments.
description: A compact, olive green bullpup rifle with an integrated rail, detachable translucent magazine, and a streamlined, modern design.
description_view_0: Side view showing the olive green body, integrated rail, detachable magazine, and the full profile of the bullpup stock.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the barrel opening, narrow profile, and the alignment of the rail and sight system.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the magazine, stock, and the overall compactness of the rifle.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the buttstock, rear of the rail, and the overall width of the rifle.
